content:
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/2StaD7QMgk0x5zl0DZLbkaZAo1_r2_500.jpg)

So instead of having two separate about page, please visit my **customary about page** ([Me, Myself and No One Else](https://macsf.net/breadcrumb/me/)) at my blog.

If you're too lazy to drop by, I'll summarize it for you.

* It began about 3.5 decade ago.
* I was educated from a Catholic school in Bangkok.
* I spent 8 years in San Francisco.
* I am a self-trained web developer.
* I sell yarns.
* I like traveling so I go on trips as much as I can.
* I like watching movies, reading and sleeping.
* I am a Catholic, so I pray.
